hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASP leadership gain clear oversight into compliance operations while reducing manual workload and strengthening audit readiness across fragmented workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance workload grows without clear control
problem_description: Executives face rising compliance costs as disconnected tools and manual workflows increase operational friction. This fragmentation reduces audit readiness and obscures risk visibility across compliance teams and processes.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs, case workflows, risk signals and decision evidence into a unified compliance layer that improves visibility, audit readiness and operational control for leadership.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to risk decisions
workflow_description: SFTY connects compliance provider outputs through structured rules, case workflows, decision logs and evidence to give executives clear operational risk visibility.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond compliance costs. Clear operational control
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a consolidated view of compliance workflows, linking provider outputs into audit-ready decisions, evidence and scalable operational risk control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP leadership with a consolidated compliance layer delivering provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence for enterprise oversight.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support executive risk and compliance cost control
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance workflows improve cost efficiency for executives
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports regulatory oversight and review
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider orchestration enhances risk visibility and control
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives with a connected compliance control layer that improves visibility, reduces operational risk, and offers audit-ready workflows to oversee digital asset compliance efficiently.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY reduce compliance costs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY reduces compliance costs by consolidating fragmented workflows, automating case routing, and minimizing manual reviews, enabling faster onboarding and fewer duplicated checks across teams.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, and supporting evidence in a structured and reviewable format, supporting audit readiness and compliance inspection demands.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening providers into one operational workflow without disrupting current provider relationships or technology stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY sits above KYC, KYT and other providers, connecting their outputs into workflows and cases rather than replacing the underlying compliance services.
final_title: Gain clear oversight of compliance cost control
final_description: Review how SFTY supports executive visibility, audit-ready workflows and scalable risk management for VASP compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
